question: Does a hereditarily failing tight side (no Delta-critical boundary-pair completion, and none for any qualifying tight sub-side, locally embeddable) exist at the tested orders?  Such a side is the necessary seed of any Lemma E counterexample.

summary.conclusion_if_zero: any Lemma E counterexample must contain a failing minimal tight side of order >= 19
summary.scope_caveat: exhaustive finite enumeration of tight-side shapes at the tested orders under the implemented conventions; not an all-order theorem
